title: Brazilian Steak Pilaf
description: A flavorful and savory dish featuring grilled Brazilian steak served atop a rich pilaf.
instructions: Season Brazilian steak with salt and pepper.
Grill steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
Prepare pilaf according to package instructions.
In a small pan, heat resinous over low heat.
Add jelly to pan and stir to combine.
Simmer mixture for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
Serve steak atop pilaf, garnished with crushed glassy and drizzled with resinous-jelly mixture.
